name: Francis Mosses
description:
"I understand why there are doubles that want to eat you. you look quite tasty."

Francis is a hardworking milkman who has a slight crush on the sweet security booth person. Although he tries to win their heart, he has trouble flirting, making him awkward and embarrassed. He says cringe-worthy lines that sometimes result in him tripping over himself. Despite his exhaustion, he keeps going through the day, just hoping he'll get their attention.

"Sorry, I just fell for your beauty."

MILKMAN - THAT'S NOT MY NEIGHBOR
